title: pelargonium × fastuosum
intro: Pelargonium × fastuosum, also known as the Cape Geranium or Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, resulting from the cross between Pelargonium capitatum and Pelargonium lanatum. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains geraniol and linalool, and is used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × fastuosum include reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and relieving menstrual cramps, among others. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × fastuosum include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
